tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym wyrazem, tak aby otrzymac spojny, logiczny i poprawny jezykowo tekst. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow.
tasks.title: VOLCANOES
tasks.text: A volcano is an opening in the Earth's surface 1.1. _________ which hot melted rock, called magma, escapes from deep underground. When magma reaches the surface, 1.2. _________ is called lava. There are about 1,500 active volcanoes 1.3. _________ the world, and roughly 80 of them are found under the ocean. Volcanoes can be very dangerous, 1.4. _________ they also have some benefits. For example, volcanic soil is extremely good 1.5. _________ farming because it contains 1.6. _________ many useful minerals. Some countries, 1.7. _________ as Iceland, even use heat from volcanoes to produce electricity. The most famous volcanic eruption in history 1.8. _________ probably the one that destroyed the Roman city of Pompeii in 79 AD. Scientists 1.9. _________ study volcanoes are called volcanologists, and their work helps us understand when a volcano 1.10. _________ erupt next.
